purpose: What applyTurnResult/state writer should update after every scene turn.
write_every_turn_if_changed: active characters and who was actually present
important visible items and who has them
who formed suspicions or wrong beliefs
relationship changes if a real shift happened
protected moments if a phrase/action strongly affected a character
write_to_character_memory_when: a character made a promise or received an order
a character formed a notable suspicion or wrong belief
a character is hiding something after the scene
write_to_relationship_pair_when: one participant changed how they see the other
a shared memory, promise, conflict, object, protection, accusation or emotional pivot appeared
one side now knows/suspects/misreads something about the other
forbidden: do not record calendar/rules as character knowledge
do not give absent characters knowledge of the scene
do not invent emotional changes not supported by scene
do not erase existing hooks unless the scene resolved them
